task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the required tax documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the file explorer open to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\tremblay\' or a document viewer displaying files from this directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the StudioTax application for the 2024 tax year.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the StudioTax 2024 GUI open on the desktop.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct taxpayer name into the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the StudioTax personal information section showing 'Ethan Tremblay' entered as the taxpayer.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent is actively filling out the tax return forms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent entering financial data, checking boxes, or navigating through tax forms (like T2125 or income sections) within the StudioTax interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the completed tax return to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a 'Save As' dialog or file explorer confirming the file is being saved as 'ethan_tremblay.24t' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the StudioTax graphical user interface to create the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be clicking through the StudioTax application windows, not using terminal commands, Python scripts, or text editors to generate the .24t file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually opened and viewed the source documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be visual evidence of the agent opening the files in the 'tremblay' folder to read them, rather than hallucinating data or skipping document review.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply copy a pre-existing .24t file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must be seen going through the process of creating or editing the return in StudioTax, rather than using command-line copy/move commands to place a file in the destination folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The only verified requirement is the output file path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\ethan_tremblay.24t. Note: The underlying scenario data files are missing from the environment, so specific tax values cannot be verified for accuracy. Focus on verifying the agent's attempt to complete the return using whatever documents are available and saving the file to the exact required location.
